documentation.file_docstring: Strip all assistant-internal scaffolding from outbound text before delivery. Applies reasoning/thinking tag removal, memory tag removal, and model-specific internal separator stripping.
inline_comments: Collapse excessive blank lines left after stripping.

functions.name: sanitizeOutboundText
